name: Yaizu Suisankagaku Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yaizu Suisankagaku Industry Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells natural seasonings, healthy foods, functional foods, and other foods in Japan. The company offers seasonings and processed dried foods, including instant bouillons, various types of soup stocks for noodles, instant noodles, frozen foods, faux crabs, sweets, snack foods, seasoning mixes for rice, and rice with green tea mixes. It also provides various types of supplements and functional beverages, cosmetics, and diagnostic drugs. In addition, the company offers functional materials, such as n-acetylglucosamine, anserine, theaflavin, chitin oligosaccharide, chitosan, chitosan oligosaccharide, glucosamine, chondroitin sulfate, and fucoidan. Yaizu Suisankagaku Industry Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.
